claims.falsification: schemas/lean-provisioning-build-timeout-pass-0033.json is missing, has a different schema, status, source binding, build timeout status, negative fixture count, or seal
claims.text: Pass 0033 created a LeanProvisioningBuildTimeoutContract/v1 artifact with status LEAN_PROVISIONING_MATCH_WITH_BUILD_TIMEOUT, source_remediation_sha256 fd35080a7d14c8be0fcb96cea88293d2ca106977080a4eeae687228ce77e3a62, timeout status TIMEOUT_TERMINATED, negative_fixture_count 10, and seal 8871fe5c59a75d81f24e6396a62d6cf484c7504d3304c695861c4b4799c16a9c.

claims.falsification: the provisioning fixture is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or is not linked from the schema
claims.text: Pass 0033 records fixture fixtures/lean-provisioning-build-timeout-pass-0033.json with sha256 0fdac6d4a3e787b78c9bb11bbc19f089e87c1f3b694fde89ef8ec1a2c782dc91 and seal 253454846e935adc19ad0cb1ff251eaeef33d00b40dc00e0473f4644fa8adf7d.

claims.falsification: the release receipt is missing, has a different tag, asset name, archive hash, elan-init hash, or omits --no-modify-path
claims.text: Pass 0033 release receipt records Elan release tag v4.2.3, asset elan-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip, asset_sha256 be5e92a2dfdd8176099b2db0b810c27237c9054f1e5db1126f4f2a1134773b25, elan_init_sha256 175089915efc623126a1560ed517cd52ec2d4d09f2adc1c10f22f56568fed5ad, and installer flag --no-modify-path.

claims.falsification: the contained install probe is missing, reports nonzero exit, omits temp ELAN_HOME, modifies normal PATH, hides external write, or omits lean.exe or lake.exe
claims.text: Pass 0033 contained install probe records install_exit_code 0, elan_home_ref temp:telos-pass0033-elan-home, normal_path_modified false, external_write_performed false, temp_write_performed true, and temp bin files including lean.exe and lake.exe.

claims.falsification: the toolchain probe is missing or reports a different Elan, Lean, Lake, or Lean toolchain commit
claims.text: Pass 0033 toolchain probe records elan 4.2.3, Lean 4.31.0 commit 68218e876d2a38b1985b8590fff244a83c321783, and Lake version 5.0.0-src+68218e8.

claims.falsification: the build attempt is missing, does not reach Lake or Lean workers, reports semantic failure, promotes theorem replay, or has a different timeout classification
claims.text: Pass 0033 verifier attempt records status TIMEOUT_TERMINATED, failure_class mathlib_build_long_running_timeout, elapsed_timeout_seconds 604, monitor_window_seconds 600, lake_reached true, lean_workers_reached true, semantic_failure_observed false, and theorem_replay_completed false.

claims.falsification: the process stop receipt is missing, has a different stopped count, or leaves matching temp Lean/Lake/Bash processes running
claims.text: Pass 0033 process stop receipt records stopped_count 27 and remaining_count_after_stop 0 for processes whose command lines referenced the temp Elan home, temp pipeline-math clone, or temp python3 shim.

claims.falsification: the build artifact snapshot is missing or reports different file count, byte sum, or .olean count
claims.text: Pass 0033 build artifact snapshot records 46930 files, 3208367614 bytes, and 2659 .olean files under the partial .lake tree at timeout.

claims.falsification: the validator result is missing, reports DRIFT, has different install status, Lake reachability, replay completion, process count, or negative fixture count
claims.text: Pass 0033 validator result reports MATCH with contained_install_status MATCH, lake_reached true, theorem_replay_completed false, processes_remaining_after_stop 0, and negative_fixture_count 10.

claims.falsification: pass 0033 artifacts promote Lake build success, theorem replay, theorem correctness, system install, buyer adoption, or a natural law
claims.text: Pass 0033 preserves non-promotion boundaries: toolchain_install_scope temp_elan_home, normal_path_modified false, external_write_performed false, lake build timed out, theorem_replay_completed false, replay_promotion_allowed false, semantic_failure_observed false, and current_promoted_natural_laws none.

title: Dogfood Pass 0033 Lean Provisioning Build Timeout
